title: [Skyship, Dais]
description: In the area's center sits a dais of packed dirt that has been raised in the stone floor.  A pedestal of bone has been placed atop the mound, built primarily from the longer leg and arm remains of larger creatures but also set with multiple humanoid skulls at its base.  Wide grooves are carved in the floor surrounding the mound, each marked with bright vermillion paint on the interior.
